text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 141 

SPLMTL_AFLTD_PGM 

LABEL: annual provider Record in Supplemental Affiliated Programs File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is/are one or more record(s) in the provider Affiliated Program 
supplemental file for this provider (linking from provider base to provider Affiliated Programs file via 
the CCW_APR_LINK_KEY). 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_AFLTD_PGM 

LONG
